sources.expression: $this->wpdb->get_var( $this->wpdb->prepare( sprintf( 'SELECT `method_order` FROM `%s` WHERE `instance_id` = %%d ORDER BY `method_order` ASC', $this->get_table() ), $instance_id ) )

$wpdb->get_results("
            	SELECT m.meta_value AS shipping_country, p.post_status AS post_status , COUNT(p.ID) AS orders
            	FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} m, {$wpdb->posts} p
            	WHERE p.ID = m.post_id
            	AND m.meta_key = '_shipping_country'
            	GROUP BY shipping_country, post_status ORDER BY orders DESC")

$wpdb->get_results("
            	SELECT min(post_date) min, max(post_date) max, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, min(post_date), max(post_date) )+1 months
            	FROM {$wpdb->posts} p
            	WHERE p.post_type = 'shop_order'
            	AND p.post_status = 'wc-completed'
            	")

sinks.expression: wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to access this page!', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'This file was already downloaded! Please retry bulk action!', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
wp_die( __( 'Shipping method duplication error. Please try again later.', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
$this->wpdb->get_var( $this->wpdb->prepare( sprintf( 'SELECT `method_order` FROM `%s` WHERE `instance_id` = %%d ORDER BY `method_order` ASC', $this->get_table() ), $instance_id ) )
wp_send_json_error(['message' => __('Could not send email. Please try again later.', 'flexible-shipping')], 500)

$wpdb->get_results("
            	SELECT m.meta_value AS shipping_country, p.post_status AS post_status , COUNT(p.ID) AS orders
            	FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} m, {$wpdb->posts} p
            	WHERE p.ID = m.post_id
            	AND m.meta_key = '_shipping_country'
            	GROUP BY shipping_country, post_status ORDER BY orders DESC")

$wpdb->get_results("
            	SELECT min(post_date) min, max(post_date) max, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, min(post_date), max(post_date) )+1 months
            	FROM {$wpdb->posts} p
            	WHERE p.post_type = 'shop_order'
            	AND p.post_status = 'wc-completed'
            	")

sanitizers.expression: esc_html( __( 'If you have a moment, please let us know why you are deactivating the plugin (anonymous feedback):', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
esc_html( __( 'I don\'t like the new version of the rules table', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Please let us know how we can improve it', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
esc_html( __( 'I have found a better plugin', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
esc_html( __( 'I only needed the plugin for a short period', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
esc_html( __( 'I no longer need the plugin', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
esc_html( __( 'It\'s a temporary deactivation. I\'m just debugging an issue.', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Please let us know how we can improve our plugin', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
$this->wpdb->prepare( sprintf( 'SELECT `method_order` FROM `%s` WHERE `instance_id` = %%d ORDER BY `method_order` ASC', $this->get_table() ), $instance_id )
wp_kses_post( __( 'Please mind that the ranges you define must not overlap each other and make sure there are no gaps between them.', 'flexible-shipping' ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Missing rules table - settings cannot be saved!', 'flexible-shipping' ) )

wp_kses_post( wpautop( __( 'This is where the rules table should be displayed. If it\'s not, it is usually caused by the conflict with the other plugins you are currently using, JavaScript error or the caching issue. Clear your browser\'s cache or deactivate the plugins which may be interfering.', 'flexible-shipping' ) ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'Thank you in advance!%1$s~ Octolize Team', 'flexible-shipping' ), '
' ) )
